name: Easy Salmon Chowder
recipeIngredient: 15 1/2 oz Red Sockeye Salmon; Drained, Boneless, Skinned and Broken into Chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a 10-inch skillet until crisp, about 8 minutes.
2. Remove the bacon and drain on paper towels.
3. Combine the onion, chicken broth, au gratin potato mix (both the potatoes and sauce mix), water, undrained corn, and black pepper with the bacon in a 3-1/2 quart slow cooker.
4. Cover and cook on the low setting for 6 hours.
5. Add the salmon, milk, and evaporated milk. Cover and cook on the high setting for 15 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
